title: Vietnamese-Style Grilled Cheese Nem
description: A fusion dish that combines the flavors of Vietnam with the comfort of grilled cheese. Tender nem wrappers filled with melted cheese, grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: Vietnamese nem wrappers
ingredients.notes: found in most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Cut the nem wrappers into 4-inch squares.
Place a square of nem wrapper on a flat surface and sprinkle a quarter of the shredded cheese in the center.
Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges together to seal.
Heat a non-stick pan or grill over medium heat and cook the nem for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and cheese.
Serve the grilled cheese nem hot, garnished with chopped cilantro and green onions.
